content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know the effect of the reincarnation true liquid, but he really wanted to give it a try.

However, he didn't go out directly, otherwise it would be difficult to come back at that time.

Thereupon.

He directly copied a reincarnation golden worm to copy the body here, and then let the reincarnation golden worm copy the body out.

And the reincarnation golden worm is not very intelligent, if they do this, they just think that there is a reincarnation golden worm shuttling over, and they will definitely not find out that this is the reincarnation golden worm that he copied.

Soon.

A reincarnation golden worm copied the body, and he directly let the reincarnation golden worm copy body leave with the reincarnation true liquid.

......

Somewhere in the ruins of reincarnation.

Ye Tian's true body copy body and the reincarnation gold worm copy body converged, took away those reincarnation true liquids, and then returned directly to the land of eternity.

The treasure of the Reincarnation True Liquid can definitely be brought into the land of eternity, otherwise there is no need for the Desolate Ancestors to take the risk to snatch it.

Really.

The true liquid of reincarnation was successfully brought back.

Tian Shan Pavilion.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to use a drop of reincarnation true liquid for refining to see the effect of this drop of reincarnation true liquid.

After his continuous testing and research, he finally understood the effect of the true liquid of reincarnation.

And.

He can also deduce the name of this treasure - the true liquid of reincarnation.

"The true liquid of reincarnation helps to improve cultivation, but it is more about life-saving, and for an existence like the desolate ancestor, it also has a life-saving effect. Ye Tian said darkly.

He also finally knew why the Desolate Ancestors wanted to obtain the true liquid of reincarnation, naturally to save their lives.

It is almost impossible for an ancient existence like a desolate ancestor to improve their cultivation, and they don't dare to casually try to study new breakthrough methods, once the breakthrough fails, the consequences are very serious, and they will even fall, and many life-saving things are of little use to them.

However, the true liquid of reincarnation is very useful and can save their lives.

If there is no reincarnation true liquid, they don't dare to try to break through, they don't even dare to study, and their cultivation can't be improved, if they enjoy it, they will probably enjoy countless years, and they will be bored, so naturally they can only sleep.

"If there is enough reincarnation true liquid, they really have the hope of breaking through to the level of the Nine Awakenings or breaking the Nine Origin Boundaries on the other side, comparable to the realm of the Origin Ancestor. "

This is also the goal of every Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

But.

For Ye Tian, the reincarnation true liquid is not so valuable.

First of all, he doesn't need to be alive, he can make a replica of a duplicate body, and thus conduct countless studies.

For him, the only value of the true liquid of reincarnation is to improve his cultivation.

I have to say that the reincarnation true liquid is very versatile, not only can it improve the body of reincarnation Haotian, but also the origin of reincarnation Haotian, and even the will of the origin realm.

Ye Tian's current reincarnation Haotian body and reincarnation Haotian origin have reached the limit of the second balance, and they cannot be improved, but the will of the origin realm can still be improved.

It's just that using the reincarnation true liquid to enhance the will of the Origin Realm is simply too wasteful.

If the Wild Ancestor knew, he would definitely have to scold Ye Tian for wasting it.

"If I fully control the energy of the reincarnation true liquid and integrate it into the will of the Origin Realm, I should be able to greatly improve the will of the Origin Realm, and the waste is not too great. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to do this.

Rumble!!!!!

The true liquid of reincarnation was rapidly consumed, and his will to the Origin Realm was also rapidly improving.

......

Reincarnation of the Golden Worm's Nest.

Ye Tian is also fighting the idea of other reincarnation true liquids, these reincarnation true liquids come from inside these trees, but these trees are very tough, and the desolate ancestors can easily tear them apart, but if the ordinary reincarnation golden worm wants to tear these trees, it will be a little difficult.

Ye Tian slowly tore the tree, preparing to break it open and take out the reincarnation true liquid from it.

He also looked around, and the reincarnation golden worm that stayed here did not stop him, which made him breathe a sigh of relief.

If these reincarnation gold worms came to stop him, he would have to give up.

After a period of time, a tree was finally torn open by Ye Tian, and drops of reincarnation true liquid diffused out.

And Ye Tian quickly collected these reincarnation true liquids, and soon took away the reincarnation true liquids contained in the entire tree.

Afterwards.

He quickly left, leaving another reincarnation golden worm replica body here.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian moved again and again to take away the true liquid of reincarnation contained in these trees.

I don't know if it's because he picked up too much reincarnation true liquid.

this day.

The reincarnation golden worm nest directly removed Ye Tian's copy body, obviously the reincarnation golden worm nest still has a little instinct, and can sense the existence of danger, so as to erase the danger.

After being driven away by the reincarnation golden worm's nest, he had another reincarnation golden worm left here, ready to continue to break through the tree to take away the reincarnation true liquid, but he was immediately removed.

"No, as long as I make a move, the reincarnation golden worm nest will move me away, so there is no way to take away the reincarnation true liquid!"

Ye Tian thought about it and could only choose to give up.

Fortunately, he had obtained a lot of reincarnation true liquid this time, and the Desolate Ancestors did not gain as much as him, so he was also very satisfied.

"There must be more than one reincarnation golden worm nest, if you can find other reincarnation golden worm nests, it would be great!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he was also looking for other reincarnation golden worm nests, but he couldn't find them at all, it seemed that as long as the reincarnation golden worm inside the reincarnation golden worm nest didn't ask for help and didn't give the coordinates, he couldn't find it.

Or, he needs to wait until the reincarnation golden worm nest slowly recalls the reincarnation golden worm before he can return with these reincarnation golden worms and thus find the reincarnation golden worm nest.

"I can only wait for the reincarnation golden worm to disappear, and follow the reincarnation golden worm nest and wait for the opportunity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that even if he waited until that time, he might not be able to come back, because at that time, there would be no reincarnation gold worm in the ruins of reincarnation, which meant that he would not be able to come out at all!

But what the specific situation is, we will know when the time comes!

The years passed.

More than 100,000 years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian used the origin of the reincarnation golden insect and the reincarnation true liquid to finally raise the will of the origin realm to the limit of the second bottleneck.

At this point, he can go to the third balance.

"The reincarnation true liquid helps to break through, and with the three-source secret medicine, the hope of breakthrough should be great!"

Ye Tian immediately began to break through.

Reincarnation true liquid, swallow a drop.

Three-source secret medicine, swallow one dose.

Ye Tian immediately began to attack the third balance, and this time he felt that he should have the hope of a successful breakthrough.
